examples: Half an hour before tea a slow handclap developed into more substantial chanting in an attempt to rouse the bowlers.
And police officers gave Home Secretary Jack Straw a slow handclap during his speech to the Police Federation conference where he claimed Labour had maintained standards.
Phenomenal Handclap Band tosses together classic rock, dance music and electronica, and its delightful "Form and Control" (Tummy Touch) manages to be both retro and of the moment.
